files.patch:
@@ -524,2 +524,2 @@
-    Enables deep copying of 'doc-files' directories. Subdirectories and all\n\
-    contents are recursively copied to the destination
+    The -docfilessubdirs option is no longer required and\n\
+    may be removed in a future release.
@@ -601,1 +601,2 @@
-    ':' can also be used anywhere in the argument as a separator.
+    Use '*' to exclude all subdirectories. ':' can also be used\n\
+    anywhere in the argument as a separator.
@@ -791,0 +792,5 @@
+# L10N: do not localize the option name -docfilessubdirs
+doclet.docfilessubdirs_specified=\
+    Note: The -docfilessubdirs option is no longer required and\n\
+    may be removed in a future release.
+

@@ -488,4 +488,4 @@
-:   Enables deep copying of `doc-files` directories. Subdirectories and all
-    contents are recursively copied to the destination. For example, the
-    directory `doc-files/example/images` and all of its contents are copied.
-    Use the [`-excludedocfilessubdir`](#option-excludedocfilessubdir) option to
+:   This option is no longer required and may be removed in a future release.
+    The `javadoc` tool now recursively copies subdirectories of `doc-files`
+    directories by default. Use the
+    [`-excludedocfilessubdir`](#option-excludedocfilessubdir) option to
@@ -504,3 +504,3 @@
-:   Excludes any subdirectories with the given names
-    when recursively copying `doc-files` subdirectories.
-    See [`-docfilessubdirs`](#option-docfilessubdirs).
+:   Excludes any subdirectories with the given names when recursively copying
+    `doc-files` subdirectories. You can use `*` to exclude all subdirectories
+    from being copied, but note that `*` must be quoted or escaped in the shell.

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@ - * Copyright (c) 2016, 2024, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. + * Copyright (c) 2016, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved. @@ -26,1 +26,1 @@ - * @bug 8157349 8185985 8194953 8214738 + * @bug 8157349 8185985 8194953 8214738 8347112 @@ -54,0 +54,5 @@ + + checkOutput(Output.OUT, true, + """ + warning: The -footer option is no longer supported and will be ignored. + It may be removed in a future release."""); @@ -74,0 +79,22 @@ + // check bottom + "phi-BOTTOM-phi" + ); + + checkOrder("acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir/SubReadme.html", + """ + SubReadme (phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi)""", + "phi-TOP-phi", + // check top navbar + """ + Tree""", + """ + Deprecated""", + """ + Index""", + "phi-HEADER-phi", + """ + acme.mdle""", + """ + p""", + """ + SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory for acme.module.""", @@ -77,0 +104,22 @@ + + checkOrder("acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir/sub-dir-1/SubSubReadme.html", + """ + SubSubReadme (phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi)""", + "phi-TOP-phi", + // check top navbar + """ + Tree""", + """ + Deprecated""", + """ + Index""", + "phi-HEADER-phi", + """ + acme.mdle""", + """ + p""", + """ + SubSubReadme.html at third level of doc-file directory.""", + // check bottom + "phi-BOTTOM-phi" + ); @@ -80,2 +129,2 @@ - public void testDocFilesInMultiModulePackagesWithRecursiveCopy() { - javadoc("-d", "multi-modules-out-recursive", + public void testDocFilesInMultiModulePackages() { + javadoc("-d", "multi-modules-out", @@ -91,0 +140,9 @@ + + checkOutput(Output.OUT, true, + """ + The -docfilessubdirs option is no longer required and + may be removed in a future release.""", + """ + The -footer option is no longer supported and will be ignored. + It may be removed in a future release."""); + @@ -111,1 +169,1 @@ - // check footer + // check bottom @@ -132,1 +190,1 @@ - // check footer + // check bottom @@ -138,3 +196,26 @@ - public void testDocFilesInModulePackagesWithRecursiveCopy() { - javadoc("-d", "modules-out-recursive", - "-docfilessubdirs", + public void testDocFilesInMultiModulePackagesWithExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "multi-modules-out-exclusion", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "sub-dir", + "--module-source-path", testSrc("modules"), + "--module", "acme.mdle,acme2.mdle"); + checkExit(Exit.OK); + + checkOutput("acme.mdle/p/doc-files/inpackage.html", true, + """ + In a named module acme.module and named package p.""" + ); + + checkFiles(false, "acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir"); + + checkOutput("acme2.mdle/p2/doc-files/inpackage.html", true, + """ + In a named module acme2.mdle and named package p2.""" + ); + + checkFiles(false, "acme2.mdle/p2/doc-files/sub-dir"); + } + + @Test + public void testDocFilesInModulePackagesWithExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "modules-out-exclusion", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "sub-dir-1", @@ -144,0 +225,1 @@ + @@ -148,0 +230,9 @@ + + checkOutput("acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir/SubReadme.html", true, + """ + SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory for acme.module.""" + ); + + checkFiles(false, "acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir/sub-dir-1"); + + checkFiles(false, "acme2.mdle/p2/doc-files"); @@ -151,4 +242,3 @@ - public void testDocFilesInModulePackagesWithRecursiveCopyWithExclusion() { - javadoc("-d", "modules-out-recursive-with-exclusion", - "-docfilessubdirs", - "-excludedocfilessubdir", "sub-dir", + public void testDocFilesInModulePackagesWithWildcardExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "modules-out-wildcard-exclusion", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "*", @@ -158,0 +248,1 @@ + @@ -162,0 +253,2 @@ + + checkFiles(false, "acme.mdle/p/doc-files/sub-dir"); @@ -173,0 +266,5 @@ + + checkOutput("p1/doc-files/sub-dir/SubReadme.html", true, + "SubReadme", + "SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory." + ); @@ -176,3 +274,3 @@ - public void testDocFilesInPackagesWithRecursiveCopy() { - javadoc("-d", "packages-out-recursive", - "-docfilessubdirs", + public void testDocFilesInPackagesWithExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "packages-out-exclusion", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "sub-dir", @@ -187,4 +285,1 @@ - checkOutput("p1/doc-files/sub-dir/SubReadme.html", true, - "SubReadme", - "SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory." - ); + checkFiles(false, "p1/doc-files/sub-dir"); @@ -194,4 +289,3 @@ - public void testDocFilesInPackagesWithRecursiveCopyWithExclusion() { - javadoc("-d", "packages-out-recursive-with-exclusion", - "-docfilessubdirs", - "-excludedocfilessubdir", "sub-dir", + public void testDocFilesInPackagesWithWildcardExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "packages-out-wildcard-exclusion", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "*", @@ -205,0 +299,2 @@ + + checkFiles(false, "p1/doc-files/sub-dir"); @@ -221,0 +317,7 @@ + + checkOutput("doc-files/doc-file/SubReadme.html", true, + """ + Beep Beep (phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi) + """, + "SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory for unnamed package." + ); @@ -224,3 +327,2 @@ - public void testDocFilesInUnnamedPackagesWithRecursiveCopy() { - javadoc("-d", "unnamed-out-recursive", - "-docfilessubdirs", + public void testDocFilesInUnnamedPackagesWithExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "unnamed-out-exclusion", @@ -228,0 +330,1 @@ + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "doc-file", @@ -238,1 +341,14 @@ - checkOutput("doc-files/doc-file/SubReadme.html", true, + + checkFiles(false, "doc-files/doc-file"); + } + + @Test + public void testDocFilesInUnnamedPackagesWithWildcardExclusion() { + javadoc("-d", "unnamed-out-wildcard-exclusion", + "-windowtitle", "phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi", + "-excludedocfilessubdir", "*", + "-sourcepath", testSrc("unnamed"), + testSrc("unnamed/Foo.java") + ); + checkExit(Exit.OK); + checkOutput("doc-files/inpackage.html", true, @@ -240,1 +356,1 @@ - Beep Beep (phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi) + (phi-WINDOW-TITLE-phi) @@ -242,1 +358,1 @@ - "SubReadme.html at second level of doc-file directory for unnamed package." + "In an unnamed package" @@ -244,0 +360,2 @@ + + checkFiles(false, "doc-files/doc-file");
